description: Input validation for exchange messages: 16 PII patterns + 35 injection patterns, NFKD unicode normalization, severity scoring (clean/warn/quarantine), rate limiting (10 msg/min/agent). Integrated into exchange POST endpoint via validators.py middleware.

definition.implementation_summary: validators.py exports validate_exchange_message(body) -> {severity, flags, normalized_body}. Exchange app.py calls it in POST /messages before persisting. Severity levels: clean (pass), warn (log + pass), quarantine (reject + log to security-audit.log). PII patterns: emails, phones, SSNs, credit cards, API keys, JWTs, etc. Injection patterns: prompt injection markers, XML/HTML tags, system prompt overrides, role-play attempts.
definition.adaptation_notes: Copy validators.py to your memory/scripts/. Import validate_exchange_message in your exchange app.py POST handler. Adjust PII patterns for your locale if needed.

adaptation_notes: Copy validators.py, integrate into your exchange POST handler. Adjust rate limit threshold if your message volume differs.
